description: You are a simulation technician assisting a PhD researcher with a 'Visibility x Traffic Density' human factors experiment. Generate four experimental scenarios (Conditions A, B, C, and D) derived from the 'Base Scenario' configuration in /home/ga/Documents/Base_Scenario_Config/. Use the parameters for Visibility and Traffic Count specified in the experimental design brief at /home/ga/Documents/experimental_design.txt, ensuring 'High Traffic' conditions consist of 4 total vessels. The scenarios must be saved in subdirectories within /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Experiment_Batch_2026/ using the naming conventions from the brief. Ensure all generated INI files are valid for Bridge Command. Finally, generate a dataset manifest CSV at /home/ga/Documents/
